channel.title: Naija Digest Online
channel.description: Nigeria’s one-stop hub for breaking news, tech, football, celebrity gossip, Naija music, live TV, exchange rates and trending topics.

item.title: Copy of Switzerland beat Colombia on penalties, advance to...
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: null

item.title: Xenophobia: Senate pushes sanctions against S’Africa, orders probe
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
The Nigerian Senate warns it may review diplomatic ties with South Africa amid renewed xenophobic attacks, ordering a probe and demanding protection for Ni
Read More: https://punchng.com/xenophobia-senate-pushes-sanctions-against-safrica-orders-probe/

item.title: Ekong relishes South Africa culture during W’Cup duty
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Former Super Eagles captain William Troost-Ekong shares his enjoyment of South Africa’s culture, food, and music while on World Cup broadcasting duty.
Read More: https://punchng.com/ekong-relishes-south-africa-culture-during-wcup-duty/

item.title: Tinubu’s state police push: Security solution or 2027 political strategy?
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Explore the debate around state police in Nigeria. Is it a solution to insecurity or a political strategy for the 2027 elections? Find out more.
Read More: https://punchng.com/tinubus-state-police-push-security-solution-or-2027-political-strategy/

item.title: Police demote two officers over PoS extortion in Delta
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Two Delta State police officers were demoted for PoS extortion and misconduct after a viral video. The command reaffirms its stance against police extortio
Read More: https://punchng.com/police-demote-two-officers-over-pos-extortion-in-delta/

item.title: FCT police smash kidnap ring, arrest 560 suspects
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
The FCT Police Command has arrested 560 suspects and dismantled a notorious kidnap ring, recovering arms, drugs, and ransom money in Abuja.
Read More: https://punchng.com/fct-police-smash-kidnap-ring-arrest-560-suspects/

item.title: EFCC hands over 1,452 recovered items to Unity Schools
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
The EFCC has handed over 1,452 recovered items, including bunk beds and mattresses, to the Federal Ministry of Education to support Unity Schools nationwid
Read More: https://punchng.com/efcc-hands-over-1452-recovered-items-to-unity-schools/

item.title: Where would Argentina be if not for Messi? On a fl...
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: Argentina's remarkable comeback win against Egypt was all down to Lionel Messi, who is seemingly dragging his team to another final.

item.title: Benue woman burns lover’s two daughters to death
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
A Benue woman, Mbayegh, allegedly burned her lover’s two young daughters to death in Ukum LGA after a disagreement. Police confirm the incident and an arre
Read More: https://punchng.com/benue-woman-burns-lovers-two-daughters-to-death/

item.title: Tinubu fixing economy, will win 2027 election – Kalu
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Senator Orji Uzor Kalu expresses confidence President Bola Tinubu will win the 2027 election due to his efforts in fixing the Nigerian economy.
Read More: https://punchng.com/tinubu-fixing-economy-will-win-2027-election-kalu/

item.title: Lagos deputy speaker warns against abusive legislative oversight
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Lagos Deputy Speaker, Mojisola Meranda, cautions councillors against abusive legislative oversight, stressing its role in improving governance and ensuring
Read More: https://punchng.com/lagos-deputy-speaker-warns-against-abusive-legislative-oversight/

item.title: Hit-and-run Enugu driver kills PhD-holding police inspector
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
A PhD-holding police inspector was killed in a hit-and-run accident in Enugu. Police confirm investigation into the tragic Enugu hit-and-run incident.
Read More: https://punchng.com/hit-and-run-enugu-driver-kills-phd-holding-police-inspector/

item.title: Egypt bemoan 'injustice' after Argentina defeat
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: Hossam Hassan said Egypt were the victim of an "injustice" in their 3-2 World Cup defeat against Argentina due to FIFA wanting Lionel Messi to "stay in the running."

item.title: Swiss beat Colombia in shootout, Argentina next
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: Switzerland beat Colombia 4-3 in a penalty shootout in Vancouver on Tuesday to reach the quarterfinals of the World Cup for the first time since 1954.

item.title: Arbeloa joins Fulham after Real Madrid departure
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: Álvaro Arbeloa has been appointed head coach at Fulham having left Real Madrid last season.

item.title: Gotham FC, NYCFC to share new Queens stadium
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: Gotham FC will play home games at Etihad Park in Queens, New York, beginning in 2028, putting the reigning NWSL champions inside New York City limits for the first time.

item.title: 👀 Mahomes, Brunson lead Argentina win reaction
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: The sports world was thrilled by Argentina's epic 3-2 comeback win over Egypt in the World Cup round of 16.

item.title: Messi saves Argentina in dramatic win over Egypt
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: Lionel Messi scored in a record sixth straight World Cup knockout match to help Argentina reach the quarterfinals with a stunning late comeback to beat Egypt 3-2 in Atlanta.

item.title: Lautaro told 'emotional' Messi to enjoy 'last WC'
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: Lautaro Martinez told a visibly emotional Lionel Messi to enjoy the moment following Argentina's 3-2 triumph over Egypt on Tuesday to qualify for the quarterfinals of the FIFA World Cup.

item.title: U.S. loss sets betting records; big profits for ho...
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: The United States' run in its home World Cup led to record soccer betting handle and allowed American sportsbooks to profit handsomely when it came to an end.

item.title: Belgium's Onana out of World Cup with ACL injury
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: Belgium midfielder Amadou Onana has been ruled out of the World Cup after suffering an anterior cruciate ligament injury, the Red Devils have confirmed.

item.title: VAR review: Were Egypt unfairly denied a pivotal g...
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: Mostafa Ziko thought he had put his team up 2-0, but the video assistant intervened. Was it the correct call?

item.title: Arbeloa appointed new Fulham boss
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Alvaro Arbeloa has been appointed as Fulham's new head coach.

item.title: Switzerland break Colombian hearts with first shoot-out success
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Switzerland held their nerve to edge a tight and cagey contest with a 4-3 penalty shoot-out success over unfortunate Colombia and seal a quarter-final meeting with World Cup holders Argentina on Saturday.

item.title: Inspector killed by suspected police convoy in Enugu
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: A Police Inspector attached to the Operations Department of the Enugu State Police Command Headquarters, Dr. Paul Ikechukwu Obodo, has died after he was allegedly knocked down by a vehicle in a suspected police convoy in Enugu. The post Inspector killed by suspected police convoy in Enugu appeared f

item.title: 2027: Tinubu’s ‘tsunami’ will start from Abia South –APC caucus
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: Members of the All Progressives Congress (APC), Aba South Senatorial District, have said the victory of President Bola Tinubu in the 2027 presidential election will be like a tsunami, and that it will start from Abia South. The post 2027: Tinubu’s ‘tsunami’ will start from Abia South –APC caucus ap

item.title: US launches strikes on Iran after tankers hit in Strait of Hormuz
item.dc:creator: BBC News World
item.description: The US says the strikes are intended to impose "heavy costs", while Iran warns it will "take decisive measures" in response.

item.title: Abia police to prosecute woman, 35, for alleged attempted murder of niece
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: The Abia State Police Command has disclosed that it would prosecute a woman, Nwoko Gift, 35, for her alleged attempt to murder her niece, Miss Ebony Chimamanda, 12, at their residence. The post Abia police to prosecute woman, 35, for alleged attempted murder of niece appeared first on The Sun Nigeri

item.title: You can’t pitch Wike against Nwifuru, Ebonyi govt tells PDP
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: The Ebonyi State government has said that the opposition People’s Democratic Party (PDP) cannot pitch the Minister of the Federal Capital Territory (FCT), Nyesom Wike, against Governor Francis Nwifuru. The post You can’t pitch Wike against Nwifuru, Ebonyi govt tells PDP appeared first on The Sun Nig

item.title: Onitsha drug market hands over 400 cartons of fake, expired drugs to NAFDAC for destruction
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: The Onitsha Drug Market, popularly known as Ogbogwu, at Bridge Head, Onitsha, has handed over counterfeit, expired, and substandard drugs valued at about N435 million to the National Agency for Food, Drug Administration and Control (NAFDAC) for destruction. The post Onitsha drug market hands over 40

item.title: JAMB honours UNIZIK for promoting inclusive higher education
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: The Nnamdi Azikiwe University, Awka, has been recognised by the Joint Admissions and Matriculation Board (JAMB) for its commitment to expanding access to university education for blind candidates. The post JAMB honours UNIZIK for promoting inclusive higher education appeared first on The Sun Nigeria

item.title: Enugu bans traffic task force on federal highways
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: The Enugu State Government has banned all traffic task force operations on federal highways across the Enugu metropolis, with immediate effect, to curb the activities of fake enforcement officials accused of extorting motorists. The post Enugu bans traffic task force on federal highways appeared fir

item.title: Eyes on the ball: How Imo police are taking fight against kidnapping to forest
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: For months, the farms in Owerri West, Owerri North, and Mbaitoli council areas, especially Ndegwu, Amakohia-Ubi, Irete, Orogwe, Avu, Nekede, and Ogbaku communities have been deserted. The post Eyes on the ball: How Imo police are taking fight against kidnapping to forest appeared first on The Sun

item.title: Uzodimma ‘s Douglas Road legacy
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: For decades, Douglas Road was Owerri’s headache and heartbeat at the same time. Traffic gridlock, compounded by roadside traders and battered by erosion; it was the road everyone used, but no one fancied the frustrating experiences. The post Uzodimma ‘s Douglas Road legacy appeared first on The Sun

item.title: Ojukwu varsity law students get mentorship, honour personalities at dinner, award night
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: Law students of Chukwuemeka Odumegwu Ojukwu University (COOU), formerly, Anambra State University, drank full from the knowledge wellspring of distinguished legal luminaries at their 23rd Annual Dinner and Award Ceremony, held last weekend, in Awka, the Anambra state capital. The post Ojukwu varsity

item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: Stakeholders of the All Progressives Congress (APC) in the Moro local government area of Kwara state, under the aegis of the Moro Stakeholders Forum, have appealed to Governor Abdulrahman Abdulrazaq as well as leadership of the ruling party to uphold fairness The post Kwara 2027: Moro LG cries out o

item.title: Demand for MTN, Dangote Cement, Others Lift Stock Market by N1.86tn
item.dc:creator: ThisDay
item.description: Kayode Tokede The Nigerian stock market yesterday sustained its positive momentum, advancing by N1.86 trillion as investors renewed interest in MTN Nigeria Communications Plc, Dangote Cement Plc,  and 52 others.

item.title: Yobe Government Donates Sports Equipment To Security Agencies
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: The Yobe State Government has donated sports equipment to security agencies as part of its post-insurgency recovery and peace-building efforts. item.title: Adeboye urges students to pursue excellence, prays against school kidnappings

item.description: By Olayinka Latona The General Overseer of the Redeemed Christian Church of God (RCCG), Pastor Enoch Adejare Adeboye, has urged Nigerian students to pursue continuous academic and personal development, warning against complacency and encouraging them to strive for excellence. item.description: Parallex Bank has graduated a new cohort of trainees from its Limitless Banking Academy, reaffirming its commitment to youth empowerment and talent development in Nigeria’s banking sector. The graduation ceremony,

item.dc:creator: ThisDay
item.description: Sunday Ehigiator  Nigeria has taken a significant step towards achieving its target of producing two million metric tonnes (MT) of sugar annually as the National Sugar Development Council (NSDC) graduated

item.dc:creator: ThisDay

item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: World heritage sites are places of outstanding cultural, historical, or natural importance recognized by UNESCO. These sites require adequate protection to preserve their value for present and future generations. The post Osun Osogbo grove: Necessity of fencing at world heritage sites appeared firs

item.title: S&P Dow Jones Signals Possible Frontier-Market Cut for Indonesia
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: S&P Dow Jones Indices has listed Indonesia as a country for potential market reclassification, saying it may consider implementing special treatment for its securities if circumstances worsen.

item.title: Smart Balance Oil Reduces Bad Cholesterol
item.dc:creator: ThisDay
item.description: Every time we sit down for a meal, a silent process is happening inside our bodies that most of us never even think about. We often talk about “cholesterol” as

item.title: Switzerland stun Colombia in dramatic penalty shootout to reach quarter-finals
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: Colombia looked the more dangerous side for much of the game, with Luis Díaz, James Rodríguez and Gustavo Puerta repeatedly testing Swiss goalkeeper Gregor Kobel. Puerta came closest in the first half when his powerful strike from the edge of the area was brilliantly tipped away by Kobel, while Luis

item.title: Russia moves closer to full Olympic return ahead of 2028 Los Angeles Games
item.dc:creator: France 24
item.description: The International Olympic Committee provisionally lifted its suspension of the Russian Olympic Committee on Tuesday, paving the way for Russian athletes and teams to move closer to competing under their flag and anthem at the 2028 Los Angeles Olympics, despite strong objections from Ukraine.

item.title: 2026 World Cup: Full list of top scorers after round of 16
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: The race for the Golden Boot at the 2026 FIFA World Cup has taken another twist after the completion of the Round of 16, with Lionel Messi moving back to the top of the scoring charts following Argentina's dramatic comeback victory over Egypt. The post 2026 World Cup: Full list of top scorers after

item.title: Jigawa Raises Minimum Pension To ₦20,000, Injects ₦2.07bn Into Scheme
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: The Jigawa State Executive Council has approved a new minimum pension of ₦20,000 per month for state and local government retirees, raising the benchmark from ₦12,000 as part of efforts to improve the welfare of pensioners. The State Commissioner for Information, Youth, Sports and Culture, Hon. Sagi

item.title: World Cup 2026: Full list of quarter-final fixtures, date and time
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: The 2026 FIFA World Cup quarter-final fixtures are now complete after Switzerland defeated Colombia 4-3 on penalties following a goalless draw in the final Round of 16 fixture. The post World Cup 2026: Full list of quarter-final fixtures, date and time appeared first on Vanguard News.

item.title: FCT-IRS Unveils Taxporta To Simplify Tax Compliance Under New Tax Laws
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: The Federal Capital Territory Internal Revenue Service (FCT-IRS) has launched Taxporta, a digital tax management platform that allows taxpayers to register, file returns, make payments and obtain Tax Clearance Certificates online, as part of efforts to modernise tax administration and improve compli

item.title: Switzerland face Argentina in World Cup quarterfinal after beating Colombia
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: Switzerland beat Colombia on penalties in World Cup last 16 to set up quarterfinal meeting with Argentina.

item.title: BREAKING: Switzerland Knock Out Colombia On Penalties, To Face Argentina Next
item.dc:creator: TVC News
item.description: Switzerland have secured a place in the quarter-finals of the 2026 FIFA World Cup after defeating Colombia 4-3 on penalties following a goalless draw after 120 minutes. The two sides failed to break the deadlock in regulation time and extra time in a tense Round of 16 encounter, forcing the tie to b

item.title: Gold Holds Drop as US Strikes in Iran Cloud Rate-Hike Outlook
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: Gold held a decline as renewed US airstrikes on Iran endangered an interim deal to end the war that’s stoked inflation and raised the prospects for interest-rate hikes.

item.title: Tinubu’s reforms working, support his re-election — Ekpemupolo
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: Nigerians have been urged to support the re-election bid of President Bola Ahmed Tinubu to enable him solidify ongoing reforms for the benefit of Nigerians and the economy. The post Tinubu’s reforms working, support his re-election — Ekpemupolo appeared first on Tribune Online.

item.title: Insecurity: A’Ibom Begins Biometric Registration Of Commercial Vehicles
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: In a fresh move to strengthen security and combat kidnapping, child trafficking and other organised crimes, the Akwa Ibom State Government has approved the biometric registration of all commercial tricycles and minibuses operating across the state. The initiative, introduced by the administration of

item.title: Fulham appoint Arbeloa as Silva's successor
item.dc:creator: BBC Sport Football
item.description: Fulham appoint Alvaro Arbeloa as their new manager on a three-year contract, succeeding Marco Silva who left for Benfica.

item.title: Switzerland Survive Colombia Shootout to Reach World Cup Quarterfinals
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Switzerland held their nerve in a dramatic penalty shootout to defeat Colombia 4-3 after a goalless 120 minutes, booking a place in the FIFA World Cup quarter-finals where they will face Lionel Messi’s Argentina. In a tense last-16 encounter that produced plenty of commitment but few clear-cut chanc

item.title: Switzerland beat Colombia on penalties to reach World Cup quarter-finals
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: Switzerland beat Colombia 4-3 on penalties after a goalless draw on Tuesday to set up a quarter-final with defending champions Argentina. The post Switzerland beat Colombia on penalties to reach World Cup quarter-finals appeared first on Vanguard News.

item.title: 2 More Top ISWAP Commanders Surrender To Troops In Borno
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Troops of Operation Hadin Kai have sustained operational momentum in the North East as two more high-profile terrorist commanders surrendered to troops with valuable intelligence on terrorist operations. A statement issued to Journalists on Tuesday in Maiduguri by the acting military information off

item.title: Djokovic wins marathon battle to set up Wimbledon semi-final vs Sinner
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Novak Djokovic won a gruelling five-set battle with Felix Auger-Aliassime to set up a semi-final with reigning Wimbledon champion Jannik Sinner.

item.title: ‘Our family is broken beyond repair’: My brother took over my parents’ finances. What can I do?
item.dc:creator: MarketWatch
item.description: “Without telling me, my brother petitioned for sole guardianship of our mother.”

item.title: GM-Backed Momenta Set for Hong Kong Debut After $752 Million IPO
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: Momenta Global Ltd., a Chinese autonomous-driving firm, is set to begin trading in Hong Kong on Wednesday after raising HK$5.9 billion ($752 million) in an initial public offering, testing market appetite for loss-making firms that offer promising technologies.

item.title: Temasek-Backed Foundation Healthcare Set for Singapore Debut
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: Foundation Healthcare Holdings Ltd is set to begin trading Wednesday in Singapore after an initial public offering that was the largest of the year so far in the city state outside real estate investment trusts.

item.dc:creator: France 24

item.title: Russian missiles strike Ukraine’s capital, Kyiv, for third time in a week
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: The attacks have triggered fires in two districts of Kyiv, according to the city's mayor.

item.description: The House of Representatives Public Accounts Committee has given the Accountant-General of the Federation (AGF), Shamseldeen Babatunde Ogunjimi, a final deadline to appear before it, accusing him of repeatedly ignoring invitations and failing to provide key financial documents required for legislati

item.title: Egypt buoyed by praise for World Cup heroics despite controversial exit
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: From fans in Gaza to world leaders and supporters on social media, Egypt won hearts, even if they lost to Argentina.

item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Nigeria has recorded 65,759 suspected cases of diphtheria and 2,229 deaths since the outbreak began in 2022, highlighting the persistent threat posed by the vaccine-preventable disease despite progress in containing its spread. item.dc:creator: MarketWatch
item.description: Bonds financing the massive artificial-intelligence buildout were hit hard by selling on Tuesday, as Amazon.com set out to borrow another $25 billion in new debt.

item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Britain on Tuesday summoned Iran’s Chargé d’Affaires, Tehran’s most senior diplomat in London, following the conviction and sentencing of two Iranian nationals over the stabbing of an Iranian-born journalist in the British capital. item.dc:creator: TVC News

item.title: US Launches ‘Powerful’ Strikes On Iran After Hormuz Attacks
item.dc:creator: Channels TV

item.dc:creator: BellaNaija
item.description: Egypt exited the 2026 FIFA World Cup after a 3-2 Round of 16 loss to Argentina. item.title: Crude prices rise as U.S. launches strikes on Iran shortly after canceling its license to sell oil
item.dc:creator: MarketWatch
item.description: Oil futures climbed late Tuesday after the Treasury Department canceled a license granted on June 21 to allow for the sale of Iranian oil.

item.title: Oil Jumps on Iran Attack, Asian Stocks Set to Drop: Markets Wrap
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: Oil climbed as the US military launched fresh air strikes in Iran and revoked a waiver that allowed it to sell crude globally. Stocks in Asia were poised to drop for a second day as a selloff in chipmakers rippled across markets.

item.title: BREAKING: US launches ‘powerful’ strikes against Iran
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: The United States has launched what it described as powerful airstrikes against Iran after accusing Tehran of attacking commercial vessels in the Strait of Hormuz. The U.S. Central Command in a statement on Tuesday said the strikes were aimed at making Iran pay a heavy price for targeting commercial

item.title: DevReporting asks Osun-based journalists to apply for training, story grants ahead of governorship poll
item.dc:creator: Premium Times
item.description: The programme comes amid a prolonged leadership crisis that has disrupted governance across Osun's 30 local government areas and the Modakeke Area Council. The post DevReporting asks Osun-based journalists to apply for training, story grants ahead of governorship poll appeared first on Premium Times

item.title: Adeleke flags off free health insurance enrollment for Osun monarchs, queens
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: “I will not stop eulogising Governor Adeleke for his excellent performance in Osun State.” The post Adeleke flags off free health insurance enrollment for Osun monarchs, queens appeared first on Tribune Online.

item.title: Egypt Were ‘Cheated’ In Controversial World Cup Exit To Argentina, Says Coach
item.dc:creator: Channels TV
item.description: Hassan speculated that the officials had been put under pressure to keep one of the biggest names in the competition. The post Egypt Were ‘Cheated’ In Controversial World Cup Exit To Argentina, Says Coach appeared first on Channels Television.

item.title: Egypt were ‘cheated’ in World Cup loss to Argentina, coach Hassan says
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: 'Perhaps they wanted to keep the world champions in the competition,' Hassan said after his team was knocked out.

item.title: Oil Surges as US Strikes Targets in Iran Following Ship Attacks
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: Oil jumped as the US launched a wave of strikes against Iran in retaliation for a spate of attacks on shipping in the Strait of Hormuz.
